alkylation reagent: alkylation with iodoacetamide/50 mM TEAB at room temperature for 30 min in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylation with iodoacetamide/50 mM TEAB at room temperature for 30 min in the dark.
cleavage agent: digested by Lys-C (1:100 w/w) (WAKO Cat#129-02541) at 37 °C for 3 h and trypsin (1:100 w/w) (Thermo Fisher Scientific Cat#90305) at 37 °C for 16 h.
instrument: The peptides were identified via nano-LC–MS/MS using an LTQ-Orbitrap XL.
reduction reagent: underwent reduction with dithiothreitol/50 mM TEAB at room temperature for 30 min.
reduction concentration: underwent reduction with dithiothreitol/50 mM TEAB at room temperature for 30 min.
